patch.value: Redact local host paths (/home/<user>) from tracker item history

Full-fleet privacy audit (2026-07-21) found the maintainer username embedded as /home/<user>/container/... host paths inside pm-item CONTENTS (test command on pm-csv-xim5, readiness note on pm-csv-7jbc). User-approved non-destructive HEAD redaction: pm history-redact replaced /home/<user>/container->/workspace and /home/<user>/.pm-cli->$HOME/.pm-cli, chain-safe (verify_ok). No filter-repo/force-push (old blobs left intentionally). Tracked fleet-wide by companion pm-cli-website-z9v0.
git grep /home/<user> returns 0 tracked hits; pm history --verify ok for both items; release:check green

author: claude
message: Genericize placeholder so tracking item does not re-introduce the literal

author: claude
message: Align tracking prose with actual $HOME replacement
